final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original marketing poster for a WeChat public account article cover about a fragrance product launch.

Style/medium: premium editorial aesthetic, sophisticated Chinese commercial photography, refined magazine cover quality
Composition: centered composition with the headline as focal point, generous negative space, 16:9 aspect ratio
Subject: elegant fragrance bottle or abstract autumn scent visualization, subtle and refined
Scene/backdrop: minimal clean background with soft autumnal undertones, unobtrusive texture
Lighting/mood: soft diffused studio lighting, warm and inviting atmosphere, premium brand mood
Color palette: warm autumn tones (amber, terracotta, cream) with muted sophistication, harmonious and understated
Text (verbatim): "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香"
Constraints: headline must be the dominant visual element; Chinese typography must be elegant and highly legible; aspect ratio 16:9
Avoid: cluttered layout, competing focal points, cheap stock aesthetic, over-saturated colors, generic floral motifs
